name: EP AgentIAM — x402 Paid Services
description: Nine paid x402 endpoints for autonomous agents on Base Mainnet. Pre-execution validation, risk scoring, integrity checks, memory verification, secure tool execution, orchestration, and Delphi intelligence. All settle in USDC via x402.

validate.description: Full policy validation for agent proposals — risk score, compliance flags, proof_hash.

noleak.description: Execution integrity check — tamper detection, injection prevention, unauthorized data flow.

memguard.description: Memory state verification — drift, corruption, unauthorized modification detection.

riskoracle.description: Pre-action risk scoring — multi-factor analysis before trade, transfer, or deploy.

secureexec.description: Sandboxed tool execution validation with proof_hash generation.

flowcore.description: Full orchestration pipeline — NoLeak + RiskOracle + SecureExec + MemGuard in one call.

delphi-latest-signals.description: Latest Delphi intelligence signals — security, defi, market, ai-ecosystem.

delphi-signal-query.description: Query Delphi intelligence signals by topic — cross-referenced, relevance-scored.

delphi-intelligence-report.description: Deep intelligence report — comprehensive analysis with contradiction detection and confidence score.
